prestazioni: Engine: Replace the original 2.0L *Dino F106C* V6 (180 HP) with a *Ferrari 246 GT* 2.4L *Dino F106AL* block (240 HP), bored to 2.6L using a *JE Pistons* forged 9.5:1 compression ratio kit (PN: 364880) with *Carrillo* H-beam connecting rods (PN: CB-6005) and *ARP* custom head studs (PN: 206-4701).

Forced Induction: Install a *Garrett GT2860RS* turbocharger (0.64 A/R turbine housing) with a *Tial* 44mm external wastegate (PN: MV-R) and *Custom Plumbing Solutions* 304 stainless steel manifold, paired with a *GReddy* Type-S intercooler (PN: 12007001) and *ID1000* fuel injectors (PN: 415100).

Suspension & Handling: Replace stock suspension with *Öhlins* TTX40 coilovers (PN: 22-0200-01) featuring 8-position adjustable damping, paired with *SuperPro* polyurethane bushings (PN: SPF0116) and *Brembo* GT 6-piston calipers (PN: 09.9404.11) with *Ferodo* DS2500 brake pads (PN: FDB1617).
estetica: Bodywork: Install a *Rocket Bunny* V1 Dino-specific widebody kit (PN: RB-FER206) with *Seibon* carbon fiber front fenders (PN: CF-FER-206-F) and a *Vorsteiner* carbon fiber rear diffuser (PN: V-FER-206-D).
Wheels: Fit *BBS* LM-R 15x8 (front) and 15x10 (rear) wheels (PN: 4031230001) with *Pirelli* P7 Corsa Classic tires (205/50R15 front, 225/50R15 rear).

Interior: Replace stock seats with *Recaro* Pole Position seats (PN: 2400SPG) upholstered in *Alcantara* (color: Rosso) with *MOMO* Prototipo steering wheel (PN: 0011601013) and *Smiths* 10,000 RPM tachometer (PN: RVI270/00).
